items.title: Casino now supports MN2 and PayPal USD
items.summary: Stake with virtual coins, MN2 wallet balance, or PayPal-funded USD play balance. Deposit USD via PayPal, then switch currency in the casino.

items.title: New slot machines in the casino
items.summary: Classic Reels and Diamond Rush slots are live — spin for multi-symbol payouts on coins, MN2, or USD.

items.title: Shop booster packs and game time bundles
items.summary: New booster packs, extended game time SKUs, and exclusive bonus items are available in the shop.

items.title: Account security for real-money balances
items.summary: Enable password-on-login and real-money protection on your profile when you hold MN2 or casino USD balance.

items.title: Profile & Points sync
items.summary: Profile and Points are fully connected: use Refresh points on Profile and View full profile on Points.

items.title: Star Map 25
items.summary: Investigate 25 WH40K-themed systems, earn game points, and unlock trophies.

items.title: Lab V2.1 Hub — news, systems audit, idea board
items.summary: The Lab hub now has dedicated tabs for platform news, full systems recheck, idea boards, AI copilot, and crypto/trophy/shop rewards. Chapter V adds 25 new research upgrades.

items.title: Chapter V research rail live
items.summary: 25 new upgrades unlock AI routing, MN2 micro-rewards, trophy forge bridge, shop beacon, and sovereign core capstone after Chapter IV.

items.title: Agents + AI in the Lab
items.summary: Named agent owners on every tool, AI copilot recommendations from V2 status, and LLM co-tech sandbox for draft refinement.

items.title: Lab crypto rewards & trophy bridge
items.summary: New lab trophies with MN2 bonuses, shop SKUs for research grants and booster packs, and display-only crypto reward telemetry in the rewards tab.

items.title: Recheck all Lab functions
items.summary: Run systems audit from the Lab to verify every hub API — progression, overview, idea board, news, trophies, MN2 balance, and shop items.
